name: Lead Magnet / Free Resource
description: Offer a free resource (PDF, checklist, guide) with zero-click content approach. No link in post — use DM or comment strategy.

variables.name: hook
variables.description: Strong opener about the problem this resource solves. First 210 chars = 'see more' cutoff.

variables.name: problem
variables.description: What pain point does this resource address? Be specific.

variables.name: what_you_get
variables.description: What's in the resource? List 3-5 key takeaways with emoji bullets.

variables.name: proof
variables.description: Social proof or personal result. 'This checklist helped me increase X by 40%.'

variables.name: cta
variables.description: How to get it. Best: 'Comment PDF and I'll DM you' or 'DM me for the link'.
variables.default: Comment 'PDF' and I'll send it to your DM.

tips: NEVER put the link in the post body — it cuts reach by 40%
Zero-click content: give value IN the post, link only via DM/comment
Add the link as a comment after 15-30 minutes
PDF carousels have the highest engagement rate (~6.1%) on LinkedIn
